parameters.query:
UPDATE pipeline_sessions SET status = 'processing', current_step = 'loading_data', updated_at = NOW()
WHERE id = {{ $json.session_id }};

SELECT vs.script_text, vs.timing_marks, vs.montage_script,
       vp.prompt_text AS product_video_prompt,
       ci.title, ci.concept, ci.visual_description,
       (SELECT value FROM app_settings WHERE key = 'heygen_avatar_id') AS default_heygen_avatar_id,
       (SELECT value FROM app_settings WHERE key = 'heygen_voice_id') AS default_heygen_voice_id,
       (SELECT value FROM app_settings WHERE key = 'heygen_background') AS default_heygen_bg,
       (SELECT value FROM app_settings WHERE key = 'fal_api_key') AS fal_api_key,
       ps.subtitles_enabled AS db_subtitles_enabled,
       ps.music_volume AS db_music_volume,
       mt.file_key AS db_music_file_key
FROM pipeline_sessions ps
LEFT JOIN voice_scripts vs ON vs.id = ps.voice_script_id
LEFT JOIN video_prompts vp ON vp.id = ps.video_prompt_id
LEFT JOIN content_ideas ci ON ci.id = ps.idea_id
LEFT JOIN music_tracks mt ON mt.id = ps.music_track_id
WHERE ps.id = {{ $json.session_id }};

=UPDATE pipeline_sessions SET
  status = 'ready_for_review',
  current_step = 'review',
  raw_video_url = '{{ $('🎞️ Монтажный скрипт').first().json.product_video_url.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  final_video_url = '{{ $('🎞️ Монтажный скрипт').first().json.final_video_url.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  updated_at = NOW()
WHERE id = {{ $('🎞️ Монтажный скрипт').first().json.session_id }};

UPDATE pipeline_steps SET status = 'completed', completed_at = NOW()
WHERE session_id = {{ $('🎞️ Монтажный скрипт').first().json.session_id }} AND step_name = 'dual_montage';
